name: tuyens-agent-skills
description: Marketplace for Tuyen's Agent Skills plugins: architecture, oncall, java, python, ruby, node, and go.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic skills for multi-stack development - auto-detects any tech stack

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic architecture plugin: unified system design (boundaries + API contracts + C4 diagrams), re-architecture (monolith decomposition, service consolidation, legacy modernization), database migration planning, dependency upgrade assessment, design-to-tasks breakdown, and release notes. Every design workflow doubles as a review workflow with severity-tagged findings and verdict.

plugins.name: oncall
plugins.description: Workflow and atomic skills for oncall work: triage, investigation, root cause analysis, and postmortem.

plugins.name: java
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Java 21+ / Spring Boot 3.5+ development.

plugins.name: python
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Python 3.11+ / FastAPI / Django development.

plugins.name: ruby
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Ruby 3.2+ / Ruby on Rails 7.2+ development.

plugins.name: node
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Node.js/TypeScript development.

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Go/Gin development.
